mapper.update: UPDATE sr_order SET pay_status = #{updateObj.payStatus}, status = #{updateObj.status}, pay_time = #{updateObj.payTime}, pay_channel_code = #{updateObj.payChannelCode}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND pay_status = #{expectStatus} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sr_order SET status = 20, update_time = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0 AND pay_status = 1 AND status = 10 AND start_time <= #{now} AND end_time > #{now}
UPDATE sr_order SET status = 30, update_time = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0 AND pay_status = 1 AND status = 20 AND end_time <= #{now}
UPDATE sr_order SET status = 30, update_time = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0 AND pay_status = 1 AND status = 10 AND end_time <= #{now}
mapper.select: SELECT o.user_id AS userId, MAX(o.user_name) AS userName, MAX(u.avatar) AS avatar, SUM( TIMESTAMPDIFF( MINUTE, GREATEST(o.start_time, #{startTime}), LEAST(o.end_time, #{endTime}) ) ) AS studyMinutes, COUNT(1) AS finishedOrderCount FROM sr_order o LEFT JOIN member_user u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.status = 30 AND o.end_time > #{startTime} AND o.start_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY o.user_id HAVING studyMinutes > 0 ORDER BY studyMinutes DESC, o.user_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT o.user_id AS userId, MAX(o.user_name) AS userName, MAX(u.avatar) AS avatar, SUM(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, o.start_time, o.end_time)) AS studyMinutes, COUNT(1) AS finishedOrderCount FROM sr_order o LEFT JOIN member_user u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.status = 30 GROUP BY o.user_id HAVING studyMinutes > 0 ORDER BY studyMinutes DESC, o.user_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, start_time, end_time)), 0) FROM sr_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 30 AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sr_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 30 AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT COUNT(1) + 1 FROM ( SELECT user_id, SUM(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, start_time, end_time)) AS studyMinutes FROM sr_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 30 GROUP BY user_id HAVING studyMinutes > #{myMinutes} OR (studyMinutes = #{myMinutes} AND user_id < #{userId}) ) t
